data.body:
Gearing up for "tour" and doing some maintenance on the bass. Those top screws are 14 years old and the Phillips head was nearly gone. Had to remove them with a screw extractor. 

Fourteen years of hard cider, cinnamon whiskey, weird sweat, bar food. Let's see if the new ones can go 14 more.
